steps.title: Add the five values
steps.content: Sum the masses: $3910,3910,3130,3950,3150$, giving a total of $18050$.

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content:
The mean is $$\tfrac{18050}{5}=3610.$$ The answer is 3610.

There are five data values, so the mean must be the total divided by 5. No value is excluded from the average.
